name: A Fear Of Heights, And Other Things

reviews.review_description: This looks like it was made with early 1990s CGI technology. Very basic and not very scary at all. There are free streaming real life videos of hang gliding and rock climbing on Samsung video and Within that are much more realistic and scary. Save your 99¢.
This didn't satisfy me at all. It just different scenes that your stationery at, thats it.

Good one to buy and the team did nice job in building some experiences.

Cliff, Dark Passage and Trap Undergroud experiences are very nice and worth to try out.

Some experiences need more work or additions for example; shark one is not good enough so give it close and more immersive shark feelings, nothing to do in canyon experience but its graphics are superb and it could have bridge to break and fall down, basejump is good and made me feel falling but we cannot control it to where we want to jump.

Overall, worth buying it and looking foward for more scenes and improvements.
It need more details, some of them just put you stationary wich is not good enough, the jump is a video so you can not puck where to jump from, needs some work to be great still.
I like the idea, abd ive played plenty of vr games before, scary, non scary and ones with a much higher amount of motion, but something about this game makes me sick to my stomach when i play
Can you please make this playable on the Quest2?!!!

It’s not scary for anyone that has played be more than 2 times, it’s super stupid and it’s hard t even get scared, the only good ones are base jump and Fear of the dark
Other than that, it sucks
